name: Popcorn Fruit Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Finely cut dried fruit, any kind
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and baking powder, nutmeg, salt, and cornmeal together.
2. Combine melted shortening with sugar in a bowl.
3. Add the beaten egg to the mixture.
4. Stir in sweetened condensed milk and water until well combined.
5. Mix in the sifted dry ingredients.
6. Gradually add popped corn and dried fruit, stirring thoroughly.
7. Turn dough onto a lightly floured surface.
8. Roll out to 1/3 inch thickness.
9. Cut into desired shapes using a floured cutter.
10. Place cookies on an oiled baking sheet.
11. Bake in a hot oven (425°F) for 10-12 minutes.
WARNING: Ensure safety by not overheating the mixture and carefully handling sharp tools.
